targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE rv.id IS NOT NULL AND cardinality(rv.evidence_span_ids) > 0) AS cases_with_evidence,
  count(*) AS total_cases,
  round(
    100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE rv.id IS NOT NULL AND cardinality(rv.evidence_span_ids) > 0)
    / nullif(count(*), 0),
    2
  ) AS evidence_coverage_pct
FROM risk_cases rc
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id, evidence_span_ids
  FROM risk_verdicts
  WHERE risk_case_id = rc.id
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) rv ON true;

SELECT source_id, evidence_type, count(*) AS spans, avg(confidence) AS avg_confidence
FROM evidence_spans
GROUP BY source_id, evidence_type
ORDER BY spans DESC;

SELECT
  width_bucket(confidence, 0, 1, 10) AS confidence_bucket,
  count(*) AS spans
FROM evidence_spans
GROUP BY confidence_bucket
ORDER BY confidence_bucket;

SELECT risk_case_id, agent_name, finding_type, critic_status, confidence, created_at
FROM agent_findings
WHERE critic_status IN ('revise', 'reject', 'needs_human_review')
   OR confidence < 0.70
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
